SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation.
Doug Gary, Director of the The Tides Center, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Askin Civelek, a/k/a Rauf Civelek.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 13, 2010.

Exhibit--1--Lease dated 12/03/04.....................................................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--Ten-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 4/29/10.........................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff The Tide Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation, and against defendant Askin Civelek, a/k/a Rauf Civelek as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $3,344.00.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $3,344.00.

Additionally, plaintiff The Tide Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 144 Eddy Street, #300, San Francisco, CA. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of AUG-02-2010 remains on calendar.
